title: neotatea colombiana
intro: Neotatea colombiana, also known as the Colombian neotatea, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Columelliaceae. It is native to the Andean region of Colombia and is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the reduction of swelling and the promotion of wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Neotatea colombiana are often infused in hot water or used in decoctions to create teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
